note: Format reference only. No question text or transcripts copied.

part1.description: Interview. Two candidates answer examiner questions about themselves, opinions, habits, past experiences.

part2.description: Long turn. Candidate compares two photos and answers a question, then partner briefly responds.
part2.prompt: Compare the photos and answer the question

part3.description: Collaborative task. Both candidates discuss a task with five prompts and reach a decision.

part4.description: Discussion. Examiner asks broader questions related to the Part 3 topic.

vocabulary_style: Words tagged by CEFR level (B1/B2/C1) with short definitions. Useful grammar and phrases listed per lesson.
